name: Comedy Stock Exchange
overview:
Chairman Anil Ravipudi leads the laugh market, with Srimukhi steering the ship. Comedians trade jokes like stocks, creating a volatile mix of humor. With alliances, rivalries, and surprise challenges, this season promises more laughs and wild comedic trends. Get ready for a side-splitting ride where the only rule is to make the audience laugh!

Show Less...
